privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a C4 Model architecture diagram of WordPress CMS with two pages: System Context (8 shapes) and Container (8 shapes plus boundary). Context level includes 3 persons (Reader, Author, Admin) and 4 external systems (Email, CDN, Social Media, Plugin Repository) with 7 labeled relationships. Container level shows 7 internal components (Web Server, PHP Application, WP-Admin, REST API, Database, Media Storage, WP-Cron) with 8 relationships. The specification correctly references the official C4 model notation at c4model.com. WordPress components (PHP, MySQL, wp-includes, wp-admin, wp-content, wp-json) are architecturally accurate. All metadata constraints (min 2 pages, 10 shapes, 8 edges) are satisfied by the specification which contains 2 pages, 16 shapes, and 15 edges.
